# deepsci Profile Use-Case Fixture Project

This Project is a reusable Milestone 2 and 3 fixture. It registers two Research Topics, two Topic Workspaces, four static `deepsci-org` Topic Agent Team Profiles for UC-01, UC-02, UC-03, and UC-05, and one minimal project-local Domain Agent Team Template.

The fixture is test material, not a stable user example. It must remain declarative: no Workspace Runtime files, Run status, Agent Team Instance ids, mailbox state, gateway state, live Houmao managed-agent ids, command outputs, rich research records, or secret-like fields belong here.
